core_mechanism: a compartmental contagion (SIR-type) dynamical system over a stratified population, governed by a control reproduction number with a critical threshold at R=1 separating a decaying spread from a self-sustaining outbreak, where an external intervention shifts flows between compartments
brief_reason: The abstract builds a stage-structured, age-stratified Susceptible-Infected-Recovered model and analyzes whether an intervention pushes the control reproduction number below the epidemic threshold, which is the defining machinery of threshold-driven compartmental spreading dynamics.
